arts.ttl: Liverpool plot €75-80m move for 19-goal star, transfer could benefit Man United
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in signing Mason Greenwood at the end of the season, and they would be willing to spend a substantial amount of money on him. The 23-year-old has managed to get his career back on track with a move to Marseille, and he has been outstanding this season. The former Manchester United striker […] The post Liverpool plot €75-80m move for 19-goal star, transfer could benefit Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Luke Shaw is not in the Manchester United squad vs Wolves
arts.sum: Luke Shaw has not started for Man United in 14 months and is not in the squad against Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Man United youngster given his senior debut by Ruben Amorim as defender starts against Wolves in Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has given a start to a talented youngster for his side's Premier League game at home to Wolves. Amorim has made alterations to his team.

arts.ttl: Man United vs. Wolves: Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim hands debut to 20-year-old academy star
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim hands a first-team debut to Tyler Fredricson in Sunday's Premier League clash with Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro drops Man United team news hint as Ruben Amorim sounds selection warning
arts.sum: Manchester United will look to return to winning ways in the Premier League after the defeat to Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins' stance on Man Utd transfer as Ruben Amorim eyes Marcus Rashford swap deal
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins has fallen out of favour at Aston Villa under Unai Emery, with Marcus Rashford the first choice up front - and Manchester United could use the situation to their advantage

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer delivers Man United prediction in Wolves verdict - 'It wouldn't surprise me'
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Wolves at Old Trafford in the Premier League on Sunday

arts.ttl: Graeme Souness delivers scathing Manchester United verdict as Cristiano Ronaldo point made
arts.sum: The former Premier League midfielder believes Manchester United failed to keep the right people at the club

arts.ttl: Amorim criticised for 'MAD' Man Utd transfer decision
arts.sum: The Red Devils boss is determined to sign at least five new players during the 2025 summer transfer window and the club are open to selling the likes of Alejandro Garnacho, Marcus Rashford and Mainoo in order to generate ‘pure profit.’ However, former Liverpool and Fulham midfielder Danny Murphy believes Man Utd would be “mad” to sell Mainoo this summer, despite the fact that his current contract at Old Trafford is due to expire in 2027.

arts.ttl: Confirmed Man United squad members vs Wolves as Amorim handed injury boost
arts.sum: Man Utd play Wolves in the Premier League today and the players have arrived at Old Trafford for the game.
